description_long: This object is a cubic candle holder made of black metal with metallic corner reinforcements, featuring cut-out shapes of the four playing card suits—spade, heart, diamond, and club—on each face. The cut-outs allow the candlelight to shine through, creating decorative patterns. The top of the cube has a recessed circular cavity that holds a red tealight candle, which is lit and emits a small, visible flame. The candle holder's robust construction and geometric design give it a modern, urban aesthetic, while the playing card motifs add a playful, thematic touch. The interior is likely hollow to accommodate the candle and allow airflow. This object is suitable for outdoor or indoor urban settings, such as patios, cafes, or public seating areas.
description: A black metal cubic candle holder with playing card suit cut-outs on each side, holding a lit red tealight candle. The design is modern and sturdy, with metallic corner accents and a visible flame.
description_view_0: The front face displays a spade cut-out, with the red tealight candle and flame visible at the top.
description_view_1: This side features a heart-shaped cut-out, showing the same candle and flame above.
description_view_2: The diamond cut-out is visible on this face, with the candle and flame at the top.
description_view_3: The club suit cut-out is shown here, again with the candle and flame above.
attribute_holder_type: black metal cubic holder with card suit cut-outs
